name: Spinach Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook spinach in salted water according to package directions. Drain well.
2. Sauté onion and celery in butter until the onion is soft.
3. Spread cottage cheese over the bottom of a deep 9-inch pastry shell.
4. Mix spinach with the onion mixture and spread it over the cottage cheese.
5. Sprinkle Swiss cheese on top.
6. In a separate bowl, combine eggs, milk, nutmeg, salt, and pepper.
7. Pour the egg mixture over everything in the crust.
8. Bake at 350 degrees for 40-45 minutes or until set.
